narrative:
Cody Gakpo is a Left Winger for the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating stands at 7.45/10, which places him in the top 6% of left wingers at this tournament. This rating reflects both his club form and his performances at this World Cup, where he has played 258 minutes.

At this World Cup, Gakpo demonstrates significant attacking prowess, scoring 0.698 goals per 90 minutes from an expected goals (xG) of 0.516 per 90 minutes. He also contributes creatively with 0.349 assists per 90 minutes and 1.047 key passes per 90 minutes. His defensive work rate is notable, with 0.698 tackles and 0.698 interceptions per 90 minutes.

Gakpo is a crucial offensive threat for the Kingdom of the Netherlands, showcasing a higher goals per 90 minutes at this World Cup compared to his club level. Scouts and fans should closely monitor his continued efficiency in front of goal and his playmaking abilities. His strong tournament form, contributing 41% to his overall rating, indicates he is a player delivering under pressure.
